analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet emphasizes global interdependence revealed by COVID-19 and asserts that multilateral cooperation is essential, marking the International Day of Multilateralism and Diplomacy for Peace. Evaluation against narratives: EU1 (EU as a successful story) – Not supported; no mention of EU history or successes. EU2 (EU is united) – Not supported; no reference to intra-EU unity or agreements. EU3 (EU useful for its citizens) – Not supported; no concrete EU policies or citizen-focused benefits within the EU. EU4 (EU avant-garde actor) – Not supported; no claim of EU pioneering action. EU5 (EU global champion of fair causes) – Not supported; the tweet promotes multilateralism broadly, not specifically EU leadership on rights/democracy. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – Partially aligned conceptually (multilateralism, global cooperation), but the tweet does not mention the EU or EU actions; it speaks in general terms. Therefore, it does not clearly promote any EU-specific narrative.
